title: Executive Order 9120—Revocation of Executive Order No. 1023, Reserving Land for the Use of the Department of Agriculture
text:
ALASKA
By virtue of the authority vested in me as President of the United States, Executive Order No. 1023 of February 6, 1909, reserving certain land near the town of Rampart, Alaska, as a site for an agricultural experiment station, is hereby revoked.
This order shall become effective on the ninetieth day from the date hereof.
FRANKLIN D ROOSEVELT
The White House,
April 1, 1942.
